description_long: This house features a steeply pitched hip roof with red-orange tiles and two prominent chimneys. The facade is painted white with blue-green window shutters and trim, and large multi-pane windows dominate the front and sides, allowing ample natural light. A spacious balcony with black metal railings wraps around two sides of the house, providing outdoor living space. The main entrance is centrally located, flanked by two sets of windows and accessed by a small set of steps. The rear of the house includes a tall vertical window and additional balcony access, while the sides display a mix of window sizes and arrangements. The overall design is symmetrical from the front, with a blend of traditional and modern elements.
description: A white house with a steep hip roof, red-orange tiles, blue-green trim, large windows, and wraparound balconies with black railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and a large balcony on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended balcony, two large ground-floor windows, and minimal upper windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a tall vertical window, smaller windows, and balcony access on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a secondary entrance, balcony, and a mix of window sizes.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large multi-pane windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with small steps, flanked by large windows and accented by blue-green trim
